examples.english: The pinnacle of wisdom is fear of God.

examples.text:
10th century, Al-Mutanabbi
وَمَنْ يُنْفِقِ السَّاعَاتِ فِي جَمْعِ مِالِهِ
مَخَافَةَ فَقْرٍ فَٱلَّذِي فَعَلَ الْفَقْرُ
waman yunfiqi s-sāʕāti fī jamʕi mi-l-ihi
maḵāfata faqrin fa-llaḏī faʕala l-faqru
examples.english: Whoever spends hours accumulating wealth for fear of poverty, poverty is what they are actually doing.
